name: Siempre Inc Which Will Do Bus
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found for 'SIEMPRE' or 'SIEMPRE INC WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS AS BUS' (SAFER keyword search returned zero matches). The literal name 'Siempre Inc Which Will Do Bus' appears to be a truncated 'X which will do business as Y' style DBA string typical of California statutory disclosures, suggesting the registered entity is 'Siempre Inc' DBA something containing 'Bus'. No CA Secretary of State / bizfile match could be confirmed for the San Bruno address 547 Elm Ave (a residential property per Compass/Zillow). California PUC passenger carrier database returned no 'siempre' carriers. Likely either inactive, recently registered, or mis-extracted from a source list. Recommend manual review via CA bizfile (https://bizfileonline.sos.ca.gov/search/business) and San Mateo County FBN/DBA records.

name: Trombly School Bus
fmcsa_address: 16 Commercial Drive, Dracut, MA 01826 (mailing: 3700 Embassy Parkway Suite 500, Akron, OH 44333)
officers: Judith Crawford (President/CEO, Wilbraham MA); Cornelius Vandyk (Treasurer/Secretary/CFO, North Reading MA); John McCarthy (CEO Emeritus, Meredith NH); Westley Richters (Director); David A Duke (Director)
registry_source: Massachusetts Secretary of the Commonwealth (Corporations Division) Entity ID 042484058
notes: Strong match: legal name 'TROMBLY MOTOR COACH SERVICE INC' operates 'Trombly School Bus' DBA at 1480 Broadway Rd, Dracut, MA. Founded 1952, incorporated 1971-05-19 in MA. Company is part of Beacon Mobility (via NRT Bus, joined 2021); STB acquisition-of-control filed 2021-08-11 (John J. McCarthy). Mailing address is Akron OH (FirstGroup/parent legacy). Registered Agent: CT Corporation System. Principal Office on record: 230 Main St, North Reading, MA 01864 (NRT Bus HQ). Operating address remains Dracut MA.

name: North American School Bus LLC
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record matches the literal name 'North American School Bus LLC' (keyword searches for 'NORTH AMERICAN SCHOOL BUS', 'NORTH AMERICAN SCHOOL', 'NORTH AMERICA CENTRAL', and 'NORTH AMERICAN' all returned zero results). Address 2020 Albright Rd, Montgomery, IL 60538 was historically the Illinois Central School Bus / North America Central School Bus (NACSB) yard - listed as CLOSED on YellowPages; the 47-space tractor-trailer parking property was sold for $925,000 on 2022-02-28. NACSB's parent carrier is ILLINOIS CENTRAL SCHOOL BUS LLC (USDOT 1714924, MC-629008, HQ 3033 W Jefferson St, Joliet IL; 2,619 power units; 3,073 drivers; Satisfactory rating). Source list entry 'North American School Bus LLC' is most likely a list-quality/parsing artifact referring to the former NACSB Montgomery depot, NOT a separately registered entity. Hullison Logistics Inc also shows the same address (USDOT inactive). Recommend confirming via IL SOS (https://apps.ilsos.gov/businessentitysearch/) - no entry confirmed under this exact name.

name: S & S School Bus Garage
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record under 'S & S SCHOOL BUS', 'S & S SCHOOL', 'S S SCHOOL BUS', or 'S & S BUS' (all returned zero). The only superficially similar carrier 'SS GARAGE & TRANSPORT INC' (USDOT 2239921) is in Knoxville TN (NOT a match - different state/operation; broker w/ 0 power units, NOT AUTHORIZED). The address 400 Elementary Dr, Southmayd, TX 76268 is the bus garage of S&S Consolidated Independent School District (S&S CISD - covers Sadler/Southmayd, ~990 students, ~10 miles W of Sherman TX; S&S Elementary listed at 4217 Elementary Dr same campus). This is a PUBLIC SCHOOL DISTRICT facility, not a private operator - districts running intra-district student buses typically lack a USDOT number. NOT a tuck-in target for Summit School Services. Recommend de-listing this row as a school-district-owned garage, not a private carrier.

name: Hoyles School Transportation
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record under 'HOYLES' or 'HOYLES SCHOOL' (zero matches). No Illinois SOS business entity hit under this exact name (manual verification recommended via https://apps.ilsos.gov/businessentitysearch/). Pekin IL school transportation context: City of Pekin School Bus Transportation Department (1130 Koch St, ~85 buses/day, ~4,000 students) operated municipal service for Pekin Public Schools District 108; per 2025-2026 news coverage, the city is exiting school bus service in July 2026 with the operations transitioning to Pekin Community High School (lease/transition agreements being worked out). The address 407 S 3rd St, Pekin IL 61554 does not correspond to any documented Pekin school-bus facility or any business named 'Hoyles' in available records. Possible source-list parsing error or hyper-local sole-proprietor without USDOT. Recommend manual verification via Tazewell County records and IL SOS.
